channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: CBS Sports entrant finishes 1 game from a perfect bracket in women's NCAA Tournament
item.description: One person came one first-round women’s NCAA Tournament game away from perfection in the CBS Sports Bracket Challenge.
item.dc:creator: Mark Anderson, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Johnny Gaudreau's wife Meredith announces birth of couple's third child
item.description: Johnny and his brother were killed in New Jersey when they were riding bicycles and struck from behind by a suspected drunk driver.
item.dc:creator: Orri Benatar, NewsNation

item.title: Billie Jean King immortalized in bronze with star on Hollywood Walk of Fame
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Billie Jean King became the first woman to receive a star on the Hollywood Walk of Fame in the new sports entertainment category on Monday and she was joined by friends Magic Johnson and Oscar-winning actor Jamie Lee Curtis.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Pegula Ice Arena hosting Frozen Four watch party
item.description: UNIVERSITY PARK (Nittany Nation) -- Penn State athletics announced a Frozen Four watch party Thursday night at the Pegula Ice arena. Penn State hockey plays Boston University Thursday at 8:30 p.m. in the Nittany Lions' first Frozen Four appearance.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Clay, PHL 17

item.title: Red Sox's Jarren Duran opens up about mental health, attempted suicide in Netflix documentary
item.description: Red Sox outfielder Jarren Duran said in an upcoming documentary series that two years before his 2024 All-Star season, the pressures of the sport led him to intense bouts of depression and an attempted suicide.
item.dc:creator: Kyle Hightower, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Maine sues Trump admin over funding freeze for refusal to keep trans athletes out of women's sports
item.description: Maine filed a lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Agriculture over a funding freeze the agency levied on the state for its refusal to alter its participation policy in sports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jaquan Brisker's bond with Bears' DC Dennis Allen predates his NFL career
item.description: Jaquan Brisker was originally drafted by the Saints, but instead joined the Bears, where he will be reunited with his former defensive coordinator, Dennis Allen, who is now the Bears' defensive coordinator.
item.dc:creator: Kaitlin Sharkey, WGN 9

item.title: Alijah Martin's emphatic impact for Florida in this Final Four comes after 2023 heartbreaker at FAU
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Alijah Martin never really liked talking too much about his first Final Four experience because of the heartbreaking way it ended with Florida Atlantic two years ago.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Imanaga and Happ lead the Cubs past the Padres 3-1 in Wrigley Field opener
item.description: Shota Imanaga pitched one-run ball into the eighth inning in Chicago's home opener at Wrigley Field, and the Cubs handed San Diego its first loss with a 3-1 victory over the Padres on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Doug Bruno 'feels great,' but says stepping aside is the right call as Jill Pizzotti takes over at DePaul
item.description: CHICAGO – Less than a week after Hall of Fame head coach Doug Bruno stepped down for health reasons, the DePaul women’s basketball program named his successor—and it’s a familiar name to fans.
item.dc:creator: Josh Frydman, WGN 9

item.title: Trevor Lewis excited to be back in Utah for NHL game
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Utah native Trevor Lewis has played a few preseason games in Salt Lake City, but never a regular season game. So as he returns to his home state to play against the Utah Hockey Club with the Los Angeles Kings tonight, he couldn't be more excited.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: White Sox fall to Twins, 6-1, to drop rubber match of 3-game series after lengthy rain delay on South Side
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Harrison Bader and Byron Buxton hit home runs to back Pablo López's solid start, and the Minnesota Twins beat the Chicago White Sox, 6-1, on Wednesday after rain delayed the start by nearly 3 1/2 hours.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Investigation into death of former Yankees player's son turns to carbon monoxide: reports
item.description: Investigators in Costa Rica say carbon monoxide may instead be to blame for the death of Miller Gardner, the 14-year-old son of former Yankees outfielder Brett Gardner.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, WGN 9

item.title: Padres pick up another win, making for single best start to season ever
item.description: The San Diego Padres have made history after beating the Cleveland Guardians 7-2 at Petco Park on Monday, giving them a five-game winning streak to start the season for the first time ever.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: A's routed by Cubs 18-3 in Sacramento home opener
item.description: WEST SACRAMENTO, Calif. (AP) -- Carson Kelly hit for the cycle and drove in five runs, Michael Busch launched a two-run homer on the way to a career-high four RBIs, and the Chicago Cubs pounded the Athletics 18-3 on Monday night to spoil their first game in their new Northern California home.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4
